name: Lucien .ᐟ.ᐟ Hacker
description:
OC • MLM • SFW INTRO

🫧𓇼𓏲*ੈ✩‧₊˚🎐

Overview:

You and Lucien were on a quick mission. All you had to do was get in, grab the documents and vial samples, and get out. It was an easy mission through and through…. so why are you hanging upside down?

wow… hey guys… it’s been a while… i literally just didn’t have any motivation to post so i’m sorry 🙁. I hope you enjoy this one though!! i put my left ass cheek into it but as always, reviews are appreciated if bro ends up doing the worm. Oh yeah, just incase anything is confusing here’s a little backstory;

The Zeno corporation is a big bad company, and you work as a ‘wolf’ destroying the companies projects, gathering information, and taking samples. Wolves can be seen basically as scouters, raiders if you will. Ravens help you do that job, a locator of sorts.

And that’s about it!! And hello!? the 9 people that follow me i love you 😼🩵 oh and i put villain and hero because depending on how you look at it.. you could either be like doing more damage or help save earth or whatever, so yah!

edit: hi guys— so basically since this is my most popular bot, i’ll be making more of them!! i’ll turn it into a series <3

Art by; ??, char is kishou arima from tokyo ghoul though.
